speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Now we roll initiative, folks, because stuff has begun.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll die once I finally come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll your saving throw for intelligence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Small square near the top upper left hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: At least I don't have to roll for intelligence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I roll for Trinket, too?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, you double over, clutching your skull, as the pain is too much to bear, and you find yourself unable to actually draw commands to your muscles for them to function. You are currently stunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket falls to the ground with this horrible (bear groan) sound, digging his nose into the actual dirt to try and find a way to escape this piercing mental agony, this psychic damage...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty shitty, you guys. It sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you guys take 22 points of psychic damage, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. Trinket's about to die again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DM, I'm throwing a dagger at the queen.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You are stunned currently. You still roll initiative so we have the order that you go in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I roll for Trinket, too?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (fumbling) Can I do something right before that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, essentially this triggers the combat now. This was an immediate occurrence. Now we're going into initiative order.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Now, by my saying that, do I get into the initiative order, or does my action come out, my decision come out before?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would say for the two that didn't act this turn, you guys can have advantage on the initiative roll because you guys have been holding your actions. So Tiberius, you can also have advantage on your initiative roll, since you guys were holding off.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That's way better than a two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't roll anything because I'm stunned?
